# Daily Report — 2026-07-19

## Task Completed
Added `create_request_item_task`, `list_request_item_tasks`, and `close_request_item_task` tools
in a new `request_item_task_tools.py` module. These manage `sc_task` records linked to a
requested item (RITM / `sc_req_item`) via the `request_item` field. The tools follow the same
pattern as `incident_task_tools.py` and `problem_task_tools.py`: RITM number-to-sys_id resolver,
`_format_request_item_task` normaliser for reference fields, pagination via `_paginated_list_response`,
and optional state filter on listing. All three tools are registered in `__init__.py`,
`tool_utils.py`, `tool_packages.yaml` (service_desk + full packages).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2339
- Coverage: 93%
- New tests: 28 (request_item_task_tools.py at 95% coverage)
- All passing: yes

## Security
Same infrastructure CVEs as prior days (urllib3 2.6.3, setuptools 68.1.2, wheel 0.42.0 — not
project dependencies). No new vulnerabilities introduced.
